label: Pagination
summary: A page-number row: current page bracketed, Prev/Next in angle brackets.
era: "Pages: [1] 2 3 … Next>", the forum thread pager, current page bracketed because you cannot click where you stand.

classes.name: rs-pagination
classes.role: the page link row; the current page is bracketed via aria-current

a11y: <nav aria-label="Pages"> of real links; the current page is plain text with aria-current="page", bracketed by CSS, never a link to itself.
